close.fileUnsaved: This file has unsaved changes. Close anyway?
close.closeTerminalDescription: A process is running. Closing this tab will terminate it.
close.fileDeletedUnsavedNamed: "{{title}}" has unsaved changes. The file has been deleted. Close anyway?
close.fileDeletedUnsaved: This file has unsaved changes. The file has been deleted. Close anyway?
close.filesDeletedUnsaved_one: {{count}} file has unsaved changes. They have been deleted. Close all anyway?
close.filesDeletedUnsaved_other: {{count}} files have unsaved changes. They have been deleted. Close all anyway?
close.deleteSpaceDirty_one: 1 file has unsaved changes. Deleting this Space will discard it.
close.deleteSpaceDirty_other: {{count}} files have unsaved changes. Deleting this Space will discard them.
close.deleteSpaceBusy: A process is still running in this Space. Deleting it will terminate the process.
close.deleteSpaceBusyDirty_one: A process is still running and 1 file has unsaved changes. Deleting this Space will terminate the process and discard the change.
close.deleteSpaceBusyDirty_other: A process is still running and {{count}} files have unsaved changes. Deleting this Space will terminate the process and discard the changes.
close.quitBusy: A process is still running in a terminal. Quitting will terminate it.
close.quitDirty_one: 1 file has unsaved changes. Quitting will discard it.
close.quitDirty_other: {{count}} files have unsaved changes. Quitting will discard them.
close.quitBusyDirty_one: A process is still running and 1 file has unsaved changes. Quitting will terminate the process and discard the change.
close.quitBusyDirty_other: A process is still running and {{count}} files have unsaved changes. Quitting will terminate the process and discard the changes.
